content: Episodic memory in neural architecture planning agents can be framed as a hierarchical active curiosity bootstrapping system, where the recursive repetition of agent-centric memory scaffolding in existing research unintentionally creates a self-reinforcing search dynamic that mirrors the agent's own curiosity-driven learning loop. This self-similar dynamic means that research progress on these agents is itself a distributed embodied planning process that can be modeled using the same episodic memory mechanisms the field is trying to build.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
trigger_topic: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
